steps.title: Spot the contrast between the examples
steps.content: The passage contrasts a sleek T-38 (which glides through wind easily) with a boxy semitruck (which encounters wind resistance). These are opposite cases illustrating the main principle.

steps.title: Match the transition to the contrast
steps.content: ”On the other hand” transitions between opposing examples: the T-38 glides easily, but the boxy truck encounters resistance. The other three choices signal consequence, narrowing, or conclusion rather than contrast. That matches choice D — D is correct.
